9pt;border-bottom-color:#000000;border-top-width:0pt;border-right-width:0pt;border-left-color:#000000;vertical-align:top;border-right-color:#000000;border-left-width:0pt;border-top-style:solid;border-left-style:solid;border-bottom-width:0pt;width:87.8pt;border-top-color:#000000;border-bottom-style:solid}.c17{margin-left:36pt;padding-top:11pt;padding-left:0pt;padding-bottom:11pt;line-height:1.5;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.c25{margin-left:36pt;padding-top:11pt;padding-left:0pt;padding-bottom:16pt;line-height:2.0;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.c26{margin-left:108pt;padding-top:11pt;padding-left:0pt;padding-bottom:11pt;line-height:1.5;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.c18{margin-left:36pt;padding-top:11pt;padding-left:0pt;padding-bottom:11pt;line-height:2.0;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.c24{margin-left:72pt;padding-top:11pt;padding-left:0pt;padding-bottom:11pt;line-height:2.0;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.c8{margin-left:72pt;padding-top:11pt;padding-left:0pt;padding-bottom:11pt;line-height:1.5;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.c2{color:#d4d4d4;font-weight:400;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;font-size:10.5pt;font-family:"Arial";font-style:normal}.c1{color:#000000;font-weight:400;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;font-size:11pt;font-family:"Arial";font-style:normal}.c32{padding-top:0pt;padding-bottom:14pt;line-height:1.15;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.c20{padding-top:11pt;padding-bottom:14pt;line-height:1.5;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.c0{padding-top:0pt;padding-bottom:0pt;line-height:1.15;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.c13{padding-top:0pt;padding-bottom:0pt;line-height:1.5;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.c30{padding-top:0pt;padding-bottom:14pt;line-height:0.9130434782608695;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.c4{background-color:#323232;font-size:10.5pt;font-family:"Courier New";color:#fcfcfc;font-weight:400}.c35{color:#000000;font-weight:400;font-size:8pt;font-family:"Droid Sans Mono"}.c22{background-color:#323232;font-size:10.5pt;font-family:"Courier New";color:#fcfcfc}.c11{text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;font-family:"Arial";font-style:normal}.c31{border-spacing:0;border-collapse:collapse;margin-right:auto}.c27{background-color:#323232;font-size:13pt;font-family:"Courier New";color:#fcfcfc}.c34{background-color:#ffffff;max-width:468pt;padding:72pt 72pt 72pt 72pt}.c15{text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;font-style:normal}.c7{color:#d4d4d4;font-size:13pt;font-weight:700}.c21{padding:0;margin:0}.c28{color:#d4d4d4;font-size:17pt}.c33{color:#d4d4d4;font-size:23pt}.c6{color:#d4d4d4;font-size:10.5pt}.c3{height:87.8pt}.c16{background-color:#1f1f1f}.c14{height:40.5pt}.c36{height:119.2pt}.c9{height:103.5pt}.c5{height:11pt}.c10{font-weight:700}.title{padding-top:0pt;color:#000000;font-size:26pt;padding-bottom:3pt;font-family:"Arial";line-height:1.15;page-break-after:avoid;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}.subtitle{padding-top:0pt;color:#666666;font-size:15pt;padding-bottom:16pt;font-family:"Arial";line-height:1.15;page-break-after:avoid;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}li{color:#000000;font-size:11pt;font-family:"Arial"}p{margin:0;color:#000000;font-size:11pt;font-family:"Arial"}h1{padding-top:20pt;color:#000000;font-size:20pt;padding-bottom:6pt;font-family:"Arial";line-height:1.15;page-break-after:avoid;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}h2{padding-top:18pt;color:#000000;font-size:16pt;padding-bottom:6pt;font-family:"Arial";line-height:1.15;page-break-after:avoid;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}h3{padding-top:16pt;color:#434343;font-size:14pt;padding-bottom:4pt;font-family:"Arial";line-height:1.15;page-break-after:avoid;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}h4{padding-top:14pt;color:#666666;font-size:12pt;padding-bottom:4pt;font-family:"Arial";line-height:1.15;page-break-after:avoid;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}h5{padding-top:12pt;color:#666666;font-size:11pt;padding-bottom:4pt;font-family:"Arial";line-height:1.15;page-break-after:avoid;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}h6{padding-top:12pt;color:#666666;font-size:11pt;padding-bottom:4pt;font-family:"Arial";line-height:1.15;page-break-after:avoid;font-style:italic;orphans:2;widows:2;text-align:left}</style></head><body class="c34 doc-content"><h1 class="c16 c30" id="h.rj5vz1p87gs"><span class="c11 c10 c33">Bio-Lab Tab: Complete System Design &amp; Implementation Specification</span></h1><h2 class="c0 c16" id="h.df1bv4ltlbtj"><span class="c11 c28 c10">1. System Overview</span></h2><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c6">The </span><span class="c6 c10">Bio-Lab</span><span class="c6">&nbsp;(represented programmatically as </span><span class="c4">activeTab === &#39;combinator&#39;</span><span class="c6">) functions as the core bio-synthesis matrix of the P.O.X. Console. It is comprised of a dual-reactor ecosystem controlled by a sub-tab navigation state (</span><span class="c4">bioLabSubTab</span><span class="c2">):</span></p><ol class="c21 lst-kix_vvx4el18qm06-0 start" start="1"><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">P.O.X. Reactor (</span><span class="c22 c10">pox</span><span class="c6 c10">)</span><span class="c2">: Standard-frequency cybernetic synthesizer. Utilizes real-time and lunar-modulated calendar wave patterns to automatically splice standard 8-character DNA gene blocks over set cycles (16 seconds standard, 8 seconds boosted).</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Anomaly Engine (</span><span class="c22 c10">anomaly</span><span class="c6 c10">)</span><span class="c6">: Unstable high-energy synthesis matrix. Depletes nucleotide stockpiles to forge exotic anomalous gene blocks containing proprietary alphabetic characters (</span><span class="c4">X</span><span class="c6">, </span><span class="c4">Z</span><span class="c6">, </span><span class="c4">Y</span><span class="c6">, </span><span class="c4">W</span><span class="c2">, etc.) with unique tactical passive perks, utilizing a logarithmic chance mechanic coupled with Gaussian distribution peaks.</span></li></ol><hr><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h2 class="c0 c16" id="h.5t5y75d39mn0"><span class="c11 c28 c10">2. Visual Theme &amp; Color Schemes</span></h2><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c2">The Bio-Lab dynamically toggles its aesthetic profile based on the active sub-tab. It leverages Tailwind CSS utilities overlaid on a structural terminal-style grid.</span></p><h3 class="c0 c16" id="h.4twuu0m1jf1s"><span class="c7">A. Sub-Tab 1: P.O.X. Reactor (</span><span class="c27 c10">pox</span><span class="c11 c7">)</span></h3><ul class="c21 lst-kix_ij37qub45z07-0 start"><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Primary Tint</span><span class="c6">: Cybernetic Emerald Green (</span><span class="c4">#00FF41</span><span class="c2">)</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Accent Gradients</span><span class="c6">: </span><span class="c4">from-green-950/30 to-emerald-955/20</span><span class="c6">&nbsp;and </span><span class="c4 c15">from-[#00c93c] to-green-500</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Borders &amp; Shadows</span><span class="c6">: High-intensity green glow: </span><span class="c4 c15">shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,65,0.05)]</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Typography Role</span><span class="c6">: Clean, standard futuristic green readout utilizing </span><span class="c4">font-mono</span><span class="c6">&nbsp;and </span><span class="c4">font-sans</span><span class="c2">&nbsp;tracking.</span></li></ul><h3 class="c0 c16" id="h.51ob11te48s2"><span class="c7">B. Sub-Tab 2: Anomaly Engine (</span><span class="c10 c27">anomaly</span><span class="c11 c7">)</span></h3><ul class="c21 lst-kix_bcwo8ia21lgo-0 start"><li class="c16 c17 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Primary Tint</span><span class="c6">: Quantum Purple / Unstable Cosmic Magenta (</span><span class="c4">#a855f7</span><span class="c2">)</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Accent Gradients</span><span class="c6">: </span><span class="c4">from-purple-950/20 to-pink-500/20</span><span class="c6">&nbsp;and </span><span class="c4 c15">from-purple-600 to-pink-500</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Borders &amp; Shadows</span><span class="c6">: Radiating purple twilight: </span><span class="c4 c15">shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(168,85,247,0.15)]</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Typography Role</span><span class="c6">: Deep anomalous purple, paired with the </span><span class="c4">FlickeringPurpleText</span><span class="c2">&nbsp;component to simulate voltage drops and tachyon ripples.</span></li></ul><hr><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h2 class="c0 c16" id="h.kxcvsn1qp388"><span class="c11 c28 c10">3. Core State Variables, Refs &amp; Imports</span></h2><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c2">To replicate the state machine, maintain these react bindings:</span></p><table class="c31"><tr class="c14"><td class="c29" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c6 c10">Variable / Ref Name</span></p></td><td class="c12" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c6 c10">Type</span></p></td><td class="c19" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c6 c10">Initial Value</span></p></td><td class="c23" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c6 c10">Description</span></p></td></tr><tr class="c3"><td class="c29" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">bioLabSubTab</span></p></td><td class="c12" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">&#39;pox&#39; | &#39;anomaly&#39;</span></p></td><td class="c19" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">&#39;pox&#39;</span></p></td><td class="c23" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c2">Navigational toggle between the twin synthesizers.</span></p></td></tr><tr class="c9"><td class="c29" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">idleTime</span></p></td><td class="c12" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">number</span></p></td><td class="c19" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">16</span></p></td><td class="c23" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c2">Countdown remaining (seconds) until the next synthesis cycle.</span></p></td></tr><tr class="c9"><td class="c29" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">idleTimeRef</span></p></td><td class="c12" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">MutableRefObject&lt;number&gt;</span></p></td><td class="c19" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">16</span></p></td><td class="c23" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c2">Keeps standard timer hook synchronized in async tick loops.</span></p></td></tr><tr class="c3"><td class="c29" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">boostSecondsLeft</span></p></td><td class="c12" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">number</span></p></td><td class="c19" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">0</span></p></td><td class="c23" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c2">Remainder of reactor acceleration boost state (seconds).</span></p></td></tr><tr class="c3"><td class="c29" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">sequences</span></p></td><td class="c12" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">Array&lt;{sequence: string, count: number}&gt;</span></p></td><td class="c19" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">[]</span></p></td><td class="c23" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c2">Master ledger representing unlocked 8bp gene segments.</span></p></td></tr><tr class="c3"><td class="c29" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">anomalyEngineActive</span></p></td><td class="c12" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">boolean</span></p></td><td class="c19" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">false</span></p></td><td class="c23" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c2">Unstable fusion state switch; toggles resource extraction.</span></p></td></tr><tr class="c3"><td class="c29" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">isGeneLogPopupOpen</span></p></td><td class="c12" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">boolean</span></p></td><td class="c19" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">false</span></p></td><td class="c23" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c2">Expands the full scrolling history overlay of synthesized gene packets.</span></p></td></tr><tr class="c36"><td class="c29" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">isGeneLedgerExpanded</span></p></td><td class="c12" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">boolean</span></p></td><td class="c19" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">false</span></p></td><td class="c23" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c6">Expand overlay for the </span><span class="c6 c10">Pair-Based Molecular Step-Search</span><span class="c2">&nbsp;tool.</span></p></td></tr><tr class="c3"><td class="c29" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">discoveredPacketsLog</span></p></td><td class="c12" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">Array&lt;GenePacket&gt;</span></p></td><td class="c19" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">[]</span></p></td><td class="c23" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c2">Chronological roster of past multi-gene batch generations.</span></p></td></tr><tr class="c9"><td class="c29" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">scrollingGene</span></p></td><td class="c12" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">string</span></p></td><td class="c19" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c4">&quot;--------&quot;</span></p></td><td class="c23" colspan="1" rowspan="1"><p class="c13"><span class="c2">8-character string mimicking current synthesizer output state.</span></p></td></tr></table><hr><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h2 class="c32 c16" id="h.d28mthe1muel"><span class="c11 c28 c10">4. Analytical Utilities &amp; Mathematical Formulas</span></h2><h3 class="c0 c16" id="h.11tpfi296jqe"><span class="c11 c7">A. Lunar-Synchronized Base-Pair Wave Generator</span></h3><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c2">Every calendar day, a deterministic wave configuration is calculated to shift spawn frequencies. It matches local synodic lunar cycles based on a fixed reference epoch.</span></p><ul class="c21 lst-kix_wf9l9yu3w9ut-0 start"><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Reference Epoch</span><span class="c6">: </span><span class="c4">May 17, 2026, 01:54:00 UTC</span><span class="c2">&nbsp;(Standard Reference New Moon)</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Synodic Lunar Month Constants</span><span class="c6">: </span><span class="c4">29.53059</span><span class="c2">&nbsp;days</span></li></ul><p class="c0"><span class="c1">export interface WaveConfig {</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; pair: string; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;// &quot;GA&quot;, &quot;AT&quot;, &quot;CG&quot;, etc.</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; primary: string; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; // &quot;G&quot;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; secondary: string; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; // &quot;A&quot;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; isSuppressed: boolean; &nbsp; &nbsp; // True if designated Week 3 Congested Decay is active</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; lunarAge: number; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;// Synodic offset in days</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; phaseName: string; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; // E.g. &quot;Waxing Crescent&quot;, &quot;Full Moon&quot;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; primaryMultiplier: number; &nbsp;// Base 1.125 + moon modifier</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; secondaryMultiplier: number;// Base 1.625 + moon modifier</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">}</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h4 class="c0 c16" id="h.xc2zw5g5s7wx"><span class="c11 c6 c10">Deterministic Daily Core Calculations</span></h4><ol class="c21 lst-kix_2qc9f37bqd3e-0 start" start="1"><li class="c16 c25 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Deterministic Hashing</span><span class="c6">: Establish daily pseudo-random factors from Date strings (</span><span class="c4">YYYY-MM-DD</span><span class="c2">):<br></span></li><li class="c25 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Lunar Phase</span><span class="c2">: Calculates age relative to the Epoch:<br></span></li><li class="c18 c16 c5 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2"><br></span></li><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Week 3 Decay (50/50 Suppression)</span><span class="c2">:<br>If Calendar Day of Month is within </span></li><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">, it has a </span></li><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">&nbsp;chance to suppress active waves:<br></span></li><li class="c25 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Amplitude Oscillatory Modifiers</span><span class="c2">: The New and Full Moon modify spawn weights via sinusoid decay:<br></span></li><li class="c18 c16 c5 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2"><br></span></li><li class="c16 c5 c18 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2"><br></span></li><li class="c18 c16 c5 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2"><br></span></li></ol><hr><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h3 class="c0 c16" id="h.2plfmt6hweqj"><span class="c11 c7">B. Weighted Random Gene Synthesis</span></h3><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c6">When the Standard Reactor ticks to 0, it constructs </span><span class="c6 c10">8-character strings</span><span class="c6">&nbsp;using the day&#39;s </span><span class="c4">WaveConfig</span><span class="c2">. If suppressed, characters default to a flat </span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp;chance. Under active wave states:</span></p><ul class="c21 lst-kix_1raecaas476u-0 start"><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">If index </span></li><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">&nbsp;is preceded by </span></li><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6">&nbsp;equal to the Primary Catalyst (e.g. </span><span class="c4">G</span><span class="c6">), the Secondary Catalyst (e.g. </span><span class="c4">A</span><span class="c2">) has weight </span></li><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">&nbsp;(e.g. </span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">).</span></li><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">Otherwise, the Primary Catalyst has weight </span></li><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">&nbsp;(e.g. </span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">).</span></li></ul><hr><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h3 class="c0 c16" id="h.l2b98o7884wh"><span class="c11 c7">C. Anomaly Engine Success Scale Algorithm</span></h3><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c6">The Anomaly Engine scales logarithmic synthesis probability based on total </span><span class="c6 c10">Nucleotide reserves</span><span class="c6">. It is designed with localized </span><span class="c6 c10">Gaussian distribution peaks</span><span class="c2">&nbsp;every </span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp;of progress to reward deep-resonance tuning:</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h4 class="c0 c16" id="h.3xy7c34j01cp"><span class="c11 c6 c10">Gaussian Resonances &amp; Peak Boosts</span></h4><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c2">Localized high success spikes occur programmatically at indices </span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">:</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><hr><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h3 class="c0 c16" id="h.ktccx8eaa2s0"><span class="c11 c7">D. Anomalous Gene Attributes</span></h3><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c6">Any gene is flagged as </span><span class="c6 c10">Anomalous</span><span class="c6">&nbsp;(</span><span class="c4">isAnomalousGene = true</span><span class="c6">) if it is exactly 8 characters long and contains any symbol inside </span><span class="c4">&quot;XZYW?!$%&amp;@#&quot;</span><span class="c2">.</span></p><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c2">The primary leading character yields structural benefits assigned to the matching creature:</span></p><ul class="c21 lst-kix_7a6yxch4sort-0 start"><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c22 c10">X</span><span class="c6 c10">&nbsp;or </span><span class="c22 c10">Z</span><span class="c6 c10">&nbsp;&rarr; Vortex Phase-Strike</span><span class="c2">: Double-strike capabilities (Attacks twice per turn).</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c22 c10">Y</span><span class="c6 c10">&nbsp;or </span><span class="c10 c22">W</span><span class="c6 c10">&nbsp;&rarr; Supernova Reverb</span><span class="c2">: Self-destruction triggers on death, vaporizing opponents.</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c22 c10">?</span><span class="c6 c10">&nbsp;or </span><span class="c22 c10">!</span><span class="c6 c10">&nbsp;&rarr; Quantum Extraction</span><span class="c2">: Anomaly Harvesting amplification (+1 extra gene earned).</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c22 c10">$</span><span class="c6 c10">&nbsp;or </span><span class="c22 c10">%</span><span class="c6 c10">&nbsp;&rarr; Bio-Organic Siphon</span><span class="c2">: Life Steal (+15 HP replenished during attack phases).</span></li><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Default (Other symbols) &rarr; Temporal Mirror Shield</span><span class="c2">: Evasion capabilities (</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">&nbsp;total evasion rate).</span></li></ul><hr><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h2 class="c0 c16" id="h.nzl1qko3cnnl"><span class="c11 c28 c10">5. Periodic Reactor Heartbeat (Tick Engine)</span></h2><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c6">The core loop operates within a </span><span class="c4">1000ms</span><span class="c2">&nbsp;window. The algorithm evaluates state changes sequentially:</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">[ 1-Second Interval Ticks ]</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &#9474;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;Is Global Power Status ON?</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &#9500;&#9472;&#9472; [NO] &#9472;&#9472;&gt; Pause Loop</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &#9492;&#9472;&#9472; [YES] &#9472;&#9472;&gt; Proceed</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &#9474;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Decrement active Booster timers.</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Is Reactor frozen by a system loop?</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &#9500;&#9472;&#9472; [YES] &#9472;&#9472;&gt; Halt tick progression</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &#9492;&#9472;&#9472; [NO] &#9472;&#9472;&gt; Draw countdown variable: &quot;idleTime&quot;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &#9474;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Decrement countdown (idleTime - 1)</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Does countdown fall to &lt;= 0?</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &#9500;&#9472;&#9472; [NO] &#9472;&#9472;&gt; Update UI visual clocks &amp; exit</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &#9492;&#9472;&#9472; [YES] &#9472;&#9472;&gt; [ TRIGGER SYNTHESIS EVENT ]</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h3 class="c0 c16" id="h.rriubju932ny"><span class="c11 c7">Trigger Synthesis Decision Matrix</span></h3><ol class="c21 lst-kix_xbd0au4dqzvy-0 start" start="1"><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c11 c6 c10">Unstable Fusion Mode Authorized (Anomaly Engine is ON and Stock </span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">)</span><span class="c2">:</span></li></ol><ul class="c21 lst-kix_xbd0au4dqzvy-1 start"><li class="c24 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">Deplete exactly </span></li><li class="c8 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">&nbsp;nucleotides.</span></li><li class="c24 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">Roll a random real number </span></li><li class="c24 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">&nbsp;in </span></li><li class="c8 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">.</span></li><li class="c24 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">If </span></li><li class="c8 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">:</span></li></ul><ul class="c21 lst-kix_xbd0au4dqzvy-2 start"><li class="c26 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">Play synthesis sound effect.</span></li><li class="c26 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6">Inject generated anomalous block into gene ledger (</span><span class="c4">sequences</span><span class="c2">).</span></li><li class="c26 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6">Throw a successful console log: </span><span class="c4">&quot;Anomaly Engine Fusion Successful!&quot;</span><span class="c2">.</span></li></ul><ul class="c21 lst-kix_xbd0au4dqzvy-1"><li class="c24 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">If </span></li><li class="c8 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">:</span></li></ul><ul class="c21 lst-kix_xbd0au4dqzvy-2 start"><li class="c26 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6">Consume resources, trigger failure sound effect, and emit warnings: </span><span class="c4">&quot;Decoupling Failure. Decay logged in buffer&quot;</span><span class="c2">.</span></li></ul><ol class="c21 lst-kix_xbd0au4dqzvy-0" start="3"><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c11 c6 c10">Standard Synthesis Mode (Anomaly Engine is OFF or Stock </span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">)</span><span class="c2">:</span></li></ol><ul class="c21 lst-kix_xbd0au4dqzvy-1 start"><li class="c8 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6">Synthesize a batch containing </span><span class="c6 c10">eight (8) standard genes </span><span class="c6">using </span><span class="c4">generateWaveGeneBlock</span><span class="c2">.</span></li><li class="c8 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">Distribute genes into the ledger, tracking new unlocks vs multi-copy counts.</span></li><li class="c8 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">Increment experience structures.</span></li></ul><ol class="c21 lst-kix_xbd0au4dqzvy-0" start="5"><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Reset Timer</span><span class="c2">:</span></li></ol><ul class="c21 lst-kix_xbd0au4dqzvy-1 start"><li class="c8 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6">Set current countdown timer variables back to maximum thresholds (</span><span class="c4">8</span><span class="c6">&nbsp;for active boost states, </span><span class="c4">16</span><span class="c2">&nbsp;for standard mode).</span></li></ul><ol class="c21 lst-kix_xbd0au4dqzvy-0" start="6"><li class="c17 c16 c5 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2"></span></li></ol><hr><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h2 class="c0 c16" id="h.evs8ihvl00qu"><span class="c11 c10 c28">6. Layout Hierarchy &amp; Interactive Elements</span></h2><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c15 c35"></span></p><p class="c0"><span style="overflow: hidden; display: inline-block; margin: 0.00px 0.00px; border: 0.00px solid #000000; transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px); -webkit-transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px); width: 624.00px; height: 406.67px;"><img alt="" src="data:image/png;base64," style="width: 624.00px; height: 406.67px; margin-left: 0.00px; margin-top: 0.00px; transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px); -webkit-transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px);" title=""></span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h3 class="c16 c32" id="h.iwtg2rz88yxr"><span class="c7 c11">Interactive Dynamic Popups</span></h3><h4 class="c0 c16" id="h.shyeycumtp5n"><span class="c11 c6 c10">1. Pair-Based Molecular Step-Search Overlay</span></h4><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c2">An expandable full-frame matrix overlay that allows hierarchical sequencing through nested DNA couples:</span></p><ul class="c21 lst-kix_ewyg1nev4iqd-0 start"><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Selector Blocks</span><span class="c2">: Allows users to step through a </span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6">&nbsp;array of all possible couples (</span><span class="c4">AA</span><span class="c6">, </span><span class="c4">AC</span><span class="c6">, </span><span class="c4">AG</span><span class="c6">, </span><span class="c4">AT</span><span class="c6">... </span><span class="c4">TT</span><span class="c2">).</span></li><li class="c18 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Path Steps</span><span class="c2">: Consists of four distinct hierarchical steps (</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c2">). Selecting pairs dynamically builds the Prefix string, allowing targeted inventory filtering.</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Undo / Reset</span><span class="c2">: Single-action rollback controls to trim or clear the accumulated Prefix.</span></li></ul><h4 class="c0 c16" id="h.dcqdjh7wzwwb"><span class="c11 c6 c10">2. Synthesis Log Packet Archive</span></h4><p class="c16 c20"><span class="c2">Provides a highly specialized chronological register:</span></p><ul class="c21 lst-kix_yu9foxofmes5-0 start"><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Filtering Options</span><span class="c2">: Search text blocks to filter archived core records.</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Packet Renders</span><span class="c2">: Renders past multi-unlock batches as stylized interactive tags, highlighting anomalous segments in glowing purple text.</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6 c10">Detailed Examination</span><span class="c2">: Clicking any past gene loads its properties directly into a single-pane diagnostic reader to analyze gene age, rarity indexes, and splicing metrics.</span></li></ul><h4 class="c0 c16" id="h.upusr3jp842l"><span class="c11 c6 c10">3. Decrypted Anomaly Vault</span></h4><ul class="c21 lst-kix_wgo5hsgjlrd-0 start"><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6">Provides the anomalous segment view when the sub-tab is set to </span><span class="c4">anomaly</span><span class="c2">. It displays all secured anomalous blocks and tracks specialized custom stats.</span></li><li class="c17 c16 li-bullet-0"><span class="c6">Renders warning advisories: </span><span class="c4">&quot;INFO: Anomalous gene effects are unknown and inconsistent. Splice with caution!&quot;</span><span class="c2">&nbsp;directly inside the base layout border.</span></li></ul><hr><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><h2 class="c0 c16" id="h.8nvykflgtabe"><span class="c11 c28 c10">7. Complete Implementation Code Template</span></h2><p class="c20 c16"><span class="c2">Here is a self-contained component model demonstrating the layout structure:</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">import React, { useState, useEffect } from &#39;react&#39;;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">import { motion, AnimatePresence } from &#39;motion/react&#39;;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">import { Zap, Terminal, Search, Check } from &#39;lucide-react&#39;;</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">export default function RecreatedBioLab() {</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; const [bioLabSubTab, setBioLabSubTab] = useState&lt;&#39;pox&#39; | &#39;anomaly&#39;&gt;(&#39;pox&#39;);</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; const [anomalyEngineActive, setAnomalyEngineActive] = useState&lt;boolean&gt;(false);</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; const [idleTime, setIdleTime] = useState&lt;number&gt;(16);</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; return (</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className=&quot;flex flex-col h-full bg-black text-white p-4 font-mono select-none&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; {/* 1. Subnav Header Bar */}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className=&quot;flex border-b border-green-950/40 pb-2 gap-2 shrink-0&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;button</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; onClick={() =&gt; setBioLabSubTab(&#39;pox&#39;)}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; className={`px-4 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold border rounded uppercase tracking-wider cursor-pointer ${</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; bioLabSubTab === &#39;pox&#39;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; ? &quot;bg-green-950/20 border-[#00FF41] text-[#00FF41] shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,255,65,0.1)]&quot;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; : &quot;bg-black/40 border-green-955/40 text-green-700&quot;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; }`}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; P.O.X. Reactor</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/button&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;button</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; onClick={() =&gt; setBioLabSubTab(&#39;anomaly&#39;)}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; className={`px-4 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold border rounded uppercase tracking-wider cursor-pointer ${</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; bioLabSubTab === &#39;anomaly&#39;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; ? &quot;bg-purple-950/20 border-purple-500 text-purple-300 shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(168,85,247,0.15)]&quot;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; : &quot;bg-black/40 border-green-955/40 text-purple-805&quot;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; }`}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Anomaly Engine</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/button&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; {/* 2. Side-By-Side Main Grid layout */}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className=&quot;grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 flex-grow mt-3 overflow-hidden&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; {/* PANEL 1: Cybernetic Synthesizer controls (Left) */}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className={`bg-neutral-950 p-4 rounded border flex flex-col justify-between ${</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; bioLabSubTab === &#39;anomaly&#39; ? &quot;border-purple-900/40&quot; : &quot;border-green-900/40&quot;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; }`}&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className=&quot;flex justify-between items-center mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase text-green-700&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;span&gt;{bioLabSubTab === &#39;pox&#39; ? &quot;[ G.E.N. P.O.X. Reactor V2.4 ]&quot; : &quot;[ WARNING: UNKNOWN REACTOR ]&quot;}&lt;/span&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;span className={bioLabSubTab === &#39;anomaly&#39; ? &quot;text-purple-300 animate-pulse&quot; : &quot;text-[#00FF41]&quot;}&gt;SYSTEMS ON&lt;/span&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;h2 className=&quot;text-xs font-bold text-white tracking-wider mb-3 uppercase&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; {bioLabSubTab === &#39;pox&#39; ? &quot;Single-Node Cybernetic Synthesizer&quot; : &quot;Anomalous Synthesis Engine&quot;}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/h2&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; {/* Core countdown displays */}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className=&quot;flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className={`text-2xl font-bold p-3 bg-black border-2 rounded tracking-widest ${</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; bioLabSubTab === &#39;anomaly&#39; ? &#39;border-purple-500 text-purple-350&#39; : &#39;border-green-500 text-[#00FF41]&#39;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; }`}&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; {bioLabSubTab === &#39;pox&#39; ? &quot;AGTCGTAC&quot; : &quot;??X%?Z!!&quot;}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; {/* Visual Progress Slider */}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className=&quot;w-full max-w-sm bg-neutral-900 h-2 border rounded-full mt-3 p-0.5&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div </span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; className={`h-full rounded-sm ${bioLabSubTab === &#39;anomaly&#39; ? &#39;bg-purple-600&#39; : &#39;bg-[#00FF41]&#39;}`} </span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; style={{ width: `${(idleTime / 16) * 100}%` }}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; /&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;p className=&quot;text-[10px] mt-2 font-bold uppercase text-neutral-400&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Gene Array Ready in: &lt;span className=&quot;text-white font-mono&quot;&gt;{idleTime}s&lt;/span&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/p&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; {/* Action Triggers */}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className=&quot;space-y-2&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;button className=&quot;w-full py-2 bg-neutral-900 hover:bg-neutral-800 border border-neutral-700 text-white rounded text-xs uppercase font-bold&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Manual Acceleration (-2s)</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/button&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; {/* PANEL 2: Stock Gene ledger (Right) */}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className={`bg-neutral-950 p-4 rounded border flex flex-col justify-between ${</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; bioLabSubTab === &#39;anomaly&#39; ? &quot;border-purple-900/40&quot; : &quot;border-green-900/40&quot;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; }`}&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className={`text-[10px] uppercase mb-1.5 ${bioLabSubTab === &#39;anomaly&#39; ? &quot;text-purple-400&quot; : &quot;text-green-700&quot;}`}&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; [ SPLICER STOCK GENE LEDGER ]</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;h2 className=&quot;text-xs font-bold text-white tracking-widest mb-1&quot;&gt;Gene Inventory&lt;/h2&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;p className={`text-[9px] ${bioLabSubTab === &#39;anomaly&#39; ? &quot;text-purple-500&quot; : &quot;text-[#00c93c]&quot;}`}&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; These 8-character DNA blocks act as raw units to construct the 64-character target genome.</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/p&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className=&quot;flex-grow flex flex-col justify-center space-y-3&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; {bioLabSubTab === &#39;pox&#39; ? (</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;button className=&quot;py-4 border border-green-500/40 bg-black hover:border-[#00FF41] text-[#00FF41] rounded uppercase text-xs font-bold&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; PAIR-BASED STEP-SEARCH</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/button&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; ) : (</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className=&quot;border border-purple-500/50 bg-[#0c0512] p-3 rounded&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className=&quot;flex justify-between items-center mb-1&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;span className=&quot;text-purple-400 text-xs font-bold font-mono&quot;&gt;Anomaly Engine State&lt;/span&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;input </span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; type=&quot;checkbox&quot; </span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; checked={anomalyEngineActive} </span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; onChange={(e) =&gt; setAnomalyEngineActive(e.target.checked)} </span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; className=&quot;w-4 h-4 accent-purple-600&quot;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; /&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;p className=&quot;text-[8px] text-neutral-400&quot;&gt;Requires 250k standard nucleotides. Depletes 10,000 nucleotides per reactor cycle loop.&lt;/p&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; )}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;div className=&quot;text-[9px] border-t pt-3 mt-2 border-neutral-800&quot;&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; {bioLabSubTab === &#39;pox&#39; ? (</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;span className=&quot;text-green-700&quot;&gt;INFO: Gene blocks are used in the CONSTRUCTOR to build your target P.O.X. sequence.&lt;/span&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; ) : (</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;span className=&quot;text-purple-500&quot;&gt;INFO: Anomalous gene effects are unknown and inconsistent. Splice with caution!&lt;/span&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; )}</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; &nbsp; &lt;/div&gt;</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">&nbsp; );</span></p><p class="c0"><span class="c1">}</span></p><p class="c0 c5"><span class="c1"></span></p><p class="c0"><span style="overflow: hidden; display: inline-block; margin: 0.00px 0.00px; border: 0.00px solid #000000;
